metadata.description: Subnet ID for analytics ACA environment
Private DNS zone ID for blob storage
Private DNS zone ID for DFS (ADLS Gen2)
VNet ID for Databricks VNet injection (optional)
Databricks host subnet name for VNet injection (optional)
Databricks container subnet name for VNet injection (optional)
Log Analytics workspace name (existing shared resource)
Subnet resource ID for orchestrator VNet integration. Leave empty to skip.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for App Insights. Leave empty to skip workspace linkage.
Private DNS zone ID for blob
Private DNS zone ID for DFS
Public subnet name for VNet injection (optional)
Private subnet name for VNet injection (optional)

properties.parameters: [if(and(and(not(empty(parameters('vnetId'))), not(empty(parameters('publicSubnetName')))), not(empty(parameters('privateSubnetName')))), createObject('customVirtualNetworkId', createObject('value', parameters('vnetId')), 'customPublicSubnetName', createObject('value', parameters('publicSubnetName')), 'customPrivateSubnetName', createObject('value', parameters('privateSubnetName')), 'enableNoPublicIp', createObject('value', false())), createObject())]

metadata.description: Name of the Databricks access connector

CPU cores for the job container
